app_summary: The app is an Android Reddit client, RedReader, providing access to Reddit content and allowing users to customize their experience through settings. It includes a login flow, subreddit management, and options for adjusting the user interface, including font scaling and theme settings.

core_workflows.path: State 0 -> State 10 -> State 11 -> State 21 -> State 22 -> State 23 -> State 24 -> State 25 -> State 26 -> State 27
core_workflows.description: User accepts terms and conditions, navigates to subreddit management, then customizes text scaling and settings, and finally views a post with customized text scaling.
core_workflows.purpose: Ensures the user agrees to terms, manages their Reddit experience, and customizes the app to their liking.

screen_contexts.context: User is asked to accept Reddit's terms and conditions before proceeding.
Displays options to interact with Reddit content, including post submission and navigation to settings.
Allows users to customize font scaling for comments and inbox sections.
Enables customization of font scales for various text elements across the app.
Provides options to customize subtitle display settings, including font scaling.
Allows customization of font scale for opened post titles and other text elements.
Displays a post with options to adjust the font size for improved readability.
Enables detailed customization of font scaling for various text elements.
Provides access to different settings categories for app customization.
